issue_title: Enable refresh button on search results
issue_body:
### What's the Problem?

Currently I have to back out of search results then re search what I already did to get updated results

### Solution/Idea

Enable the refresh button to re search the folder for my search term

### Alternatives

None

### Priorities

_No response_

### Files Version

1.9.23

### Windows Version

10.0.19043.1151

### Additional comment

_No response_
pr_body:
<!--

I ACKNOWLEDGE THE FOLLOWING BEFORE PROCEEDING:
1. PR may be deleted if it is not following the template
2. Try not to make duplicates. Do a quick search before posting
3. Add a clarified title
-->

**Resolved / Related Issues**
Items resolved / related issues by this PR.
- Closes #5821
- Closes #4231 (back button, invoking a sidebar item, or otherwise navigating away will cancel the search)
- Closes #5813 
- Closes #5831
- Closes #3348
- Closes #3443
- related #2447

**Details of Changes**
Add details of changes here.
- make search more accurate by searching by filename instead of keywords (note: "$" is used to indicate advanced search and to not wrap in filename property)
- search items async
- show loading indicator while loading results
- allow refreshing search results
- allow cancelling search by navigating away
- allow dragging items in search results
- when no search results are found, show "no items found" instead of folder empty
other minor fixes:
- also fixes an issue where preview pane media controls would be too small
- fixes issue where trying to share a folder would cause the share flyout to crash
- improve thumbnails in details view by ThumbnailMode.SingleItem instead of ThumbnailMode.ListView
- fix issue where pressing open with overflow item with touch would unexpectedly close flyout

**Validation**
How did you test these changes?
- [x] Built and ran the app
- [ ] Tested the changes for accessibility

**Screenshots (optional)**

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/59544401/129529360-ef8667e0-e3e2-4f26-a268-c1c313f8821d.mp4
